visual-baseline-missing.reason: Visual regression requires reviewed baselines. Missing baseline should be classified separately from product regression.

crawler-source-of-truth-false.reason: Crawler output from public UI is baseline/candidate data, not a true source of truth.

third-party-performance-warning.reason: Third-party analytics/ad failures should not block release unless core content is affected.

stage-prod-data-drift.reason: Stage and production may differ in data freshness or assets.
